post.description: Send or resend verification email. Can also be used to change email address.

post.description: Generate TOTP secret and QR code. Secret is only shown once. Call /2fa/confirm to activate.

400.description: 2FA already enabled

post.description: Activate 2FA by verifying a TOTP code from authenticator app. Returns backup codes.

post.description: Turn off 2FA. Requires valid TOTP code or backup code.

400.description: Invalid verification code

post.description: Generate new backup codes. Invalidates previous codes. Requires valid TOTP code.

400.description: Invalid verification code or 2FA not enabled

post.description: Verify a TOTP or backup code. Sets step-up cookie on success.

post.description: Verify TOTP code and set step-up cookie for subsequent sensitive operations.

post.description: Verify password or TOTP to get step-up cookie. Required for sensitive operations.

schema.title: Response Handle Batch Cvm Status Api V1 Status Batch Post

get.description:
Get CVM state. Supports two modes:

1. Immediate mode (no target): Returns current state immediately
2. SSE mode (with target): Streams state updates until status matches target or timeout

Example:
    GET /cvms/{cvm_id}/state - Returns current state
    GET /cvms/{cvm_id}/state?target=running - Streams until status becomes 'running'

SSE connection limit: 5 concurrent connections per user

parameters.name: target

schema.description: Target status to wait for. If specified, returns SSE stream.
schema.title: Target

parameters.description: Target status to wait for. If specified, returns SSE stream.

name.title: Name
name.description: CVM name (used as hostname): 5-63 chars, must start with letter, can contain letters/numbers/hyphens

prefer_dev.title: Prefer Dev
prefer_dev.description: Prefer dev OS image (True) or non-dev OS image (False). When None, auto-selects based on image name or defaults to dev.

nonce.title: Nonce
nonce.description: Optional nonce for deterministic app_id generation. When provided, app_id must also be provided. System will verify: app_id == get_create_address(team_wallet, nonce)

app_id.title: App Id
app_id.description: Optional app_id for manual specification. Required when nonce is provided. Only works with PHALA KMS.

ProvisionDstackAppRequestV2.title: ProvisionDstackAppRequestV2
ProvisionDstackAppRequestV2.description:
Request for provisioning a DStack app with automatic resource matching.

Most fields are optional and will be automatically determined by the resource
matching logic in preflight_dstack_app. Only compose_file and name are required.

characterfile.title: Characterfile
characterfile.description: The characterfile to use for the a16z/eliza.

env_keys.title: Env Keys
env_keys.description: The environment variables to use for the a16z/eliza.

teepod_id.title: Teepod Id
teepod_id.description: The Teepod ID to use for the a16z/eliza. If not provided, it will auto select an available one.

image.title: Image
image.description: The image to use for the a16z/eliza. If not provided, it will use the latest image.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for the API key

device_kind.title: Device Kind

device_os.title: Device Os
device_os.description: Expose detected operating system as a computed field.

device_label.title: Device Label
device_label.description: Generate a user-friendly device label, including OS.

SessionResponse.title: SessionResponse
SessionResponse.description: API response model for user sessions with sanitized device info.

StepUpVerifyRequest.title: StepUpVerifyRequest
StepUpVerifyRequest.description:
Generic step-up verification request.

Accepts either current_password (for users without 2FA) or totp_code (for users with 2FA).
On success, server will issue a short-lived cookie used by sensitive endpoints.

TeeType.description: TEE type values used by Intel DCAP quote header.
